summary: For the 2015-2024 batter feature domain, no lawful timestamp-verifiable pregame batting-order publication is available. Statcast provides plate-appearance attribution only postgame; the actual batting order is therefore postgame evidence and must never be treated as a pregame lineup snapshot.
live_path_note: Top-of-order (live) batter features are only assembled from forward lineup snapshots captured strictly before each game's prediction cutoff; a postgame lineup may never substitute for a missing pregame lineup.
batter_profiles_scope: Strict-prior per-batter rate profiles ARE lawful historically (each window uses only pre-cutoff, label-available prior games); only the pregame BATTING ORDER is unavailable historically.
